sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60016" key="kriomaxe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρῑο-μᾰχέω</orth>, <sense id="n60016.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">manoeuvre with a battering-ram</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:185:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">185.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
